item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I believe that it’s mentioned the bombers are “Ilyushin” bombers, presumably a Soviet design. Further, I assume the photos taken were surveillance from afar.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
While I personally enjoy both termination logs and the Foundation dealing with real world politics, this could use some more writing.

The buildup is kinda meh, while we learn about all the shit he did not a lot of time is spent discussing them, and none of them feel especially ominous or interesting, so it feels awkward when we spend several paragraphs discussing how important killing him is. Perhaps expand on the list of his creations, and exploits, maybe hint at some atrocities he committed.

The termination log itself is kinda underdeveloped. Firstly, it's kinda brief. Conducting international assassinations of high ranking political figures is a big deal and should involve a long, very detailed log. Also, how did the foundation send a group of bombers into Russia during the hight of the cold war without starting a massive geopolitical incident? Earlier it was mentioned they managed to take photos of him, if they can get that close couldn't they find a way to put some delay acting poison in his smoked tea or something?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Nice use of a lesser-known historical oddity. Interesting concept and great execution. +1

+ Minor recommendation
- Minor recommendation

SCP-4078 presenting its theories before Joseph Stalin (far right)

Since you have "(far right)", I would also say "SCP-4078 (left)". The reader is more likely to recognize Stalin in that picture than the subject.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: All that time in development was well spent. Congrats, rattles!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Great concept. Your technical prose is impressive. Looking forward to more from you.

item.title: First skip!
item.content:encoded:
My first SCP — can't believe it turned out to be a reality-altering humanoid contest entry. For crit, thanks to PopcornK, Kakroom, and LordOfLaugh from IRC, and Elogee Fishtruck from the SCPD Discord.

(Images from the Wikipedia page on Trofim Lysenko, who is actually a rather interesting historical figure. Check it out.)
– hide block
  • https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Trofim_Lysenko_portrait.jpg
  • https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Lysenko_with_Stalin.gif

EDIT: Dumbass me forgot to say that my chosen cliche was termination attempt.
